nuggets.headline: Billie Eilish and her brother Finneas recorded their debut album in their childhood bedroom.
nuggets.text: Before she became a global sensation, Billie Eilish, whose full name is Billie Eilish Pirate Baird O'Connell, created her debut album, "WHEN WE ALL FALL ASLEEP, WHERE DO WE GO?", with her brother FINNEAS. They produced the entire record from the comfort of his tiny childhood room in Highland Park, showcasing a unique, homegrown approach to pop music production.

source.title: Meet The First-Time GRAMMY Nominee: FINNEAS On Billie Eilish ...
source.quoteSnippet: The 22-year-old, who produced all of Eilish's haunting bedroom-pop debut WHEN WE ALL FALL ASLEEP, WHERE DO WE GO? from the comfort of his own tiny childhood room in Highland Park

nuggets.imageCaption: Billie Eilish's debut album cover, recorded in her brother's bedroom.

nuggets.headline: Billie Eilish's "bad guy" ended the longest-ever run at #1 on the Hot 100.
nuggets.text: This track, "bad guy," had an incredible journey to the top of the charts. After spending nine weeks stuck at #2 behind Lil Nas X's record-breaking "Old Town Road" — the longest any song has waited in that spot before ascending — "bad guy" finally dethroned it. This moment also made Billie Eilish the first artist born in the 21st century to achieve a #1 hit on the Billboard Hot 100.

source.title: How Billie Eilish Brought Lil Nas X to the End of the “Road”
source.quoteSnippet: After nine weeks at No. 2—longer than anybody in chart history has cooled their heels in the runner-up spot before ascending—“Bad Guy” dethrones the mightiest Hot 100 No. 1 of all time, Lil Nas X’s “ Old Town Road.”

nuggets.imageCaption: Billie Eilish on her way to breaking chart records.

nuggets.headline: Finneas, Billie Eilish's brother, is her inseparable creative facilitator on all her music.
nuggets.text: If you're digging the unique sound of Billie Eilish, you absolutely need to check out Finneas, her older brother. He's not just her brother; he's her co-writer and producer on every single one of her songs, including "bad guy." In fact, he's a 10-time GRAMMY winner in his own right, even winning Producer Of The Year, Non-Classical in 2020.

source.title: How Did Billie Eilish Get Famous? 9 Facts You Didn't ... - Grammy
source.quoteSnippet: Why, none other than FINNEAS, who has worked with her throughout her career and become her inseparable creative facilitator. Basically, whenever you hear an Eilish song, you're hearing her 10-time GRAMMY-winning brother, too.

nuggets.imageCaption: Finneas O'Connell, Billie Eilish's brother and producer.

artistSummary: Billie Eilish is a GRAMMY-winning pop superstar known for her inimitable voice and raw songcraft. She rose to fame collaborating with her brother FINNEAS, creating music that defies genre expectations.
